question.label: Energy read
question.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
question.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

answer: I want more ownership, but I also want clearer guardrails.

assessment.note: [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] Answer pivots from energy into ownership and clearer guardrails, revealing growth and clarity needs off-signature; wind-down moves to support stage.

new_queue.label: Support next step
new_queue.name: What would help most from me right now?

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What support would make the biggest difference as priorities shift?

history.answer_excerpt: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
I feel better when feedback is specific and close to the work.

I am still unsure what good really looks like here week to week.
I do ask for help sometimes, but I worry about sounding slow.

Some days I feel useful, other days I feel like I am guessing.
When priorities change fast, I lose confidence in what to optimize for.
